title: Dr.PAWPAW x Paddington™ Original & Orange Marmalade Lip Balm Duo (2 x 4g), With Paddington Keyring, Hydrating Lip Balms Set with Keyring, Nourishing, Soothing Makeup, Vegan Lip Care
features: 2 Travel-Ready Balms in One Set: Includes Dr.PAWPAW’s Original Balm Stick and zesty Orange Marmalade Lip Balm, powered by pawpaw (papaya) extract, aloe vera, castor oil and olive oil to nourish, hydrate and soften lips.

Hydrating, Nourishing & Non Tinted Lip Balms: Delivers long-lasting moisture and helps soothe dry lips, with one classic formula and one fruity twist. A lip-loving duo made with skin-friendly ingredients and a smooth texture

Take Paddington Everywhere: This playful set includes a keyring so you can clip your balms to your bag or keys. The perfect on-the-go companions for soft, cared-for lips wherever your adventures take you.
Gift Set: A vegan, feel-good gift for birthdays, holidays, or anyone who loves simple, effective self-care. Thoughtful, practical, and ready to give.
Natural, Vegan & Kind to Skin: PETA-approved, suitable for all skin types, and made in Great Britain. Gentle on the skin, kind to animals, and sustainably made.
description: Product description Our fragrance free Original Lip Balm and Orange Marmalade Lip Balm to hydrate and nourish your lips, the perfect companion for any adventure with an added keyring! Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes.
